summary.headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland held its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company held its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 8, 2025. All nominees for election to the Board of Directors were elected. Shareholders also voted on advisory proposals regarding executive compensation and the ratification of auditors. Additionally, a stockholder proposal to remove the one-year holding period requirement to call a special meeting was rejected.

extraction_notes: This filing is solely about the annual meeting of stockholders and does not contain any earnings, financial guidance, or operational updates.
